markdown:
I live in London, go to Copenhagen frequently [with work](http://planday.com/), and **try to focus on these things:**

  (in order of time spent)
- working full time as senior product manager for [Planday](http://planday.com/): taking the hassle out of employee scheduling and management
- making a lovely home in SE London with my partner
- experimenting with real time event tracking tools to aid in [innovation accounting](http://leanstack.com/innovation-accounting/)
- slowly getting back into regular and pain free [CrossFit](http://crossfitlondonuk.com/) training after shoulder issues
- becoming a bad ass [recurve bow archer](https://www.2020archery.co.uk/) (this will take a looooong time...)
- reading [good books](https://www.goodreads.com/review/list/3011094?order=d&shelf=currently-reading&sort=date_added&visible_control=batchEdit)
- pondering the future

  For a more detailed view of what I have been up to recently, see my profile at [Gyroscope](https://gyrosco.pe/manne/).

  (list last updated: March 2016 | credit for the /now idea: [Derek Sivers](https://sivers.org/nowff))
